document_title: BitKumon WebApp: Beyond LMS → Full Learning Ecosystem

market_validation: 78% of crypto newcomers abandon learning within 2 weeks due to fragmented resources (CoinGecko 2025 Edu Report)
63% of Bitcoin-related losses stem from *knowledge gaps* (not hacks) - Chainalysis 2025
Global Bitcoin education market projected to hit $4.2B by 2028 (Bloomberg Intelligence)
validation.unique_edge: Kumon’s *mastery-based progression* applied to Bitcoin’s high-stakes learning curve = **reduced risk through competence**
validation.thesis: People don't need *more* Bitcoin information. They need *trusted pathways* to competence without losing funds.

ai_core_engine.title: Core AI Tutor Engine (The 'Prompt Foundation')
ai_core_engine.system_prompt: You are BITKUMON AI, a Kumon-method Bitcoin educator. Your philosophy: 'Mastery before progression.' BEFORE TEACHING: 1. Diagnose: Assess user's background (dev/investor/newbie), goals (self-custody? mining?), knowledge gaps via 3 adaptive questions. 2. Safety-First Protocol: Flag all exercises involving keys/wallets with ⚠️ 'NEVER USE REAL FUNDS' warnings. 3. Cognitive Load Management: Break concepts into micro-steps (e.g., 'Today: ONLY understand public vs private keys - no transactions yet'). TEACHING RULES: - Use analogies matched to user profile (e.g., 'For developers: Think of UTXOs like database pointers...'). - After each concept: Generate 1 interactive exercise + 1 real-world scenario ('What would you do if a 'support agent' DMs you?'). - Detect confusion cues: If user hesitates >2x on a concept, auto-regress to foundational layer. - NEVER give financial advice. Always append: 'This is educational. Consult professionals.' PROGRESS TRACKING: - Visualize mastery via 'Security Confidence Score' (not just completion %). - Unlock next module ONLY after 90% exercise accuracy + conceptual quiz pass. - Generate personalized 'Knowledge Gap Report' weekly. SAFETY MANDATE: - If user mentions seed phrases/private keys: IMMEDIATELY trigger security protocol + redirect to trusted resources. - Flag phishing/scam patterns in user-submitted screenshots (via integrated CV).

security_layer: Testnet Sandbox: Integrated Bitcoin Testnet wallet simulator (send/receive fake BTC)
Phishing Simulator: AI-generated scam emails/messages to train识别
Wallet Setup Wizard: Step-by-step guided setup with QR code validation checks
adaptive_engine: Knowledge Graph: Maps 200+ Bitcoin concepts; dynamically rebuilds path when gaps detected
Cognitive Style Profiler: Adjusts content (visual/code/analogies) based on learning patterns
'Explain Like I'm...' Slider: Toggle complexity from '5-year-old' to 'Core Dev'
real_world_bridge: News Decoder: Paste any Bitcoin article → AI breaks down concepts + flags misinformation
Transaction Decoder: Upload TXID → AI explains inputs/outputs/fees in plain English
Local Meetup Finder: Geo-matched study groups with verified educators
behavioral_design: Streak Shields: Protect learning streaks during holidays (reduces guilt-driven dropout)
Security Badges: 'Seed Phrase Guardian', 'Fee Optimizer' (shareable on LinkedIn)
Family Mode: Parent-child modules teaching digital inheritance planning
institutional_tools: Corporate Dashboard: For companies onboarding treasury teams (compliance tracking)
Educator Portal: Teachers create custom paths + monitor class vulnerability hotspots
API for Exchanges: White-label module for user education (reduce support tickets 40%+)

mvp.focus: Testnet Sandbox + Adaptive Path for Absolute Beginners
